---
title: "Instructor Only: Histograms And Density Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
nhanes <- readr::read_csv("data/real/nhanes_2021_2023_analysis.csv")

adult_bp <- nhanes |>
  filter(age_years >= 18, !is.na(systolic_mean))

ggplot(adult_bp, aes(x = systolic_mean)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution Of Adult Mean Systolic Blood Pressure",
    x = "Mean systolic blood pressure",
    y = "Number of participants"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
